headline: How The Investment Story For Pool (POOL) Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation Assumptions
summary: Pool’s consensus fair value has shifted from US$266.36 to US$255.91, giving you an updated reference point for how the stock is being valued today. That change lines up with fresh analyst work, where some are trimming targets while others are nudging them higher as they revisit assumptions around long term growth and risk. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative might shape the way you track Pool from here. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. Head over...

headline: Marvell Secures Spot In S&P 500 Index Amid AI Chip Boom
summary: Marvell will join the S&P 500 after hitting profitability targets, with strong AI momentum and earnings helping lift shares after hours.
